name: edusetu-monorepo
description: Unified runner for EduSetu Frontend and Backend

scripts.dev: (npm run dev --prefix frontend &) && (cd backend && source ../.venv/bin/activate && python3 app.py)
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix frontend && cd backend && gunicorn -w 4 -b 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-5001} "app:create_app()"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
